sources.page_title: Q²M Tire Express | Gyeon Quartz USA
sources.cleaned_content:
# Q²M Tire Express

Price: $23.99

Size: 500ml

Q²M Tire Express is a premium tire dressing designed to deliver a clean, satin tire finish with minimal effort. Its easy-to-apply formula restores the “factory fresh” look to tires while providing long-lasting protection.
This water-repellent tire dressing forms a durable, self-cleaning barrier that helps keep tires cleaner for longer, even during extended drives in rainy or wet conditions. Perfect for enthusiasts and professionals alike, Q²M Tire Express offers a reliable, no-fuss alternative to traditional tire shines and rubber dressings.

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/03348da7-4d73-495a-a06c-24e04984e1bb/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/)
![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/d31348e1-a780-49ce-a768-84b4b7f90057/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/)

## QUICK AND EASY APPLICATION

Being water based, it is extremely easy to apply and allows both a dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn't require rubbing into the surface like our SiO2 infused Q Tire.

## HEALTHY MATTE FINISH

Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self-cleaning layer that helps to keep the tire clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

![image](https://i.shgcdn.com/f96deb6a-9ebf-4f8d-9ba0-fda9b0a25b01/-/format/auto/-/preview/3000x3000/-/quality/best/)

## PRO TIP

There is no easier way to refresh the look of your vehicle tires. With a simple and straight forward application, Q²M TireExpress is the perfect frequent use dressing.
TIP: To get the most out of the product, use it on a damp tire right after the wash. Spread it evenly and let dry. A subtle, factory fresh look will be the result.

CONSUMPTION: 10-15ml/ set
DURABILITY: >2 washes

## Description

Gyeon Q²M Tire Express is the ultimate daily tyre & rubber dressing offering fantastic looks matched with a simple, straightforward application. It will restore the “factory fresh” look of the tyre and keep it for many a hundred miles. Being water based, Gyeon Tire Express is extremely easy to apply and allows both a dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn’t require rubbing into the surface like their SiO2 infused Gyeon Q² Tire.

Gyeon Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self cleaning layer that helps to keep the tyre clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

There is no easier way to refresh the look of your vehicle tyres. With a simple and straight forward application, Gyeon Q²M TireExpress is the perfect daily tyre dressing.

Spread it evenly and let dry. A subtle, factory fresh look will be the result. It can also be applied to a damp tire right after the wash.

Available in 500ml, 1 Litre & 4 Litre Bottles

## Q2M TIRE EXPRESS

SUPERB MAINTENANCE PRODUCTS FOR OUTSTANDING DETAILING PERFORMANCE

Q²M Tire Express is the ultimate everyday tyre & rubber dressing offering fantastic looks matched with a simple, straightforward application. It will restore the “factory fresh” look of the tyre and keep it for many a hundred miles.

CAPACITIES: 400 ML / 1000 ML / 4000 ML

### QUICK & EASY DAILY TYRE DRESSING

Being water based, it’s extremely easy to apply and allows both a dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn’t require rubbing into the surface like our SiO2 infused Q² Tire.

### MATTE LOOK

Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self cleaning layer that helps to keep the tyre clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

## BEST PRACTICE AND PRO-TIPS FROM YVES HEYLEN

There is no easier way to refresh the look of your vehicle tyres. With a simple and straight forward application, Q²M TireExpress is the perfect daily tyre dressing. TIP: To get the most out of the product, use it on a damp tire right after the wash. Spread it evenly and let dry. A subtle, factory fresh look will be the result.

CONSUMPTION: 10-15ml/ set
DURABILITY: >2 washes

# Gyeon Q2M Tire Express 500ml

Price: $32.99 (Tax included)

SKU: 116158

Product image:
![image](//www.carcareproducts.com.au/cdn/shop/files/116158.jpg?v=1721199797&width=1000)

## Description

Gyeon Q²M Tire Express is the ultimate daily tyre & rubber dressing offering fantastic looks matched with a simple, straightforward application. It will restore the factory fresh look of the tyre and keep it for many a hundred miles.

## Product Features and Benefits

- Cleans and protects tires in one easy step
- Safe for use on all types of tires, including white walls
- Non-acidic formula will not damage or harm tires
- Leaves a glossy and hydrophobic finish on tires
- Helps to prevent tire blooming and discoloration
- Fast and easy application

Being water based, it is extremely easy to apply and allows both a dry and wet application. It spreads on the surface very well with just one wipe and doesn’t require rubbing into the surface like our SiO2 infused Q² Tire.

Q²M Tire Express provides a very deep, natural and matte visual effect. It builds a repellent, self-cleaning layer that helps to keep the tyre clean and will not diminish even during a long drive in rainy conditions.

Consumption: 10-15ml/ set
Durability: >2 washes

## How to Use

### Step 1: Clean the Tires
Before using Gyeon Q2M Tire Express, make sure your tires are clean and free of dirt and grime. You can use a tire cleaner, such as Gyeon Q2M Tire Cleaner, to clean your tires before applying the tire dressing.

### Step 2: Apply Gyeon Q2M Tire Express
Shake the bottle well before use. Apply Gyeon Q2M Tire Express directly onto the tire surface, using a foam applicator pad or a microfiber towel. Be sure to cover the entire surface of the tire, including the sidewalls and any grooves or crevices.

### Step 3: Spread the Dressing
Use the foam applicator pad or microfiber towel to spread the tire dressing evenly over the surface of the tire. Make sure to apply a thin, even coat for the best results.

### Step 4: Let the Dressing Dry
Allow the tire dressing to dry completely before driving your vehicle. This will ensure that the dressing does not sling or rub off onto your car’s paint or other surfaces.

### Step 5: Repeat as Needed
Gyeon Q2M Tire Express is designed to provide a long-lasting shine and protection for your tires. However, you may need to reapply the dressing every few weeks to maintain the desired level of gloss.
